arts.ttl: West Ham tipped to pursue transfer of striker who’s “a bit like Ollie Watkins”
arts.sum: West Ham United are being tipped to pursue the transfer of AC Milan striker Tammy Abraham this summer. The 27-year-old is currently on loan at Milan from Roma, and one imagines his future will be something that’s up for discussion at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Huge €50m fee likely to put an end to West Ham transfer idea
arts.sum: According to a report in the Turkish media, West Ham United are likely to be priced out of signing Fenerbahce forward Youssef En-Nesyri. The Hammers have again been linked with the Morocco international in recent weeks as Graham Potter looks to bring in a centre forward during the next transfer window. arts.ttl: “Angry and sad” – Julen Lopetegui opens up on West Ham exit and what went wrong with Hammers
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui has revealed he was surprised with West Ham United’s decision to part ways with him. Friday’s edition of AS has published an interview with the 58-year-old where the majority of the focus was on the Hammers. arts.ttl: Antonio taking 'baby steps' towards West Ham return
arts.sum: Michail Antonio is taking "baby steps" as he continues his rehabilitation from a broken leg sustained in a car crash, says West Ham boss Graham Potter.
